footer.description: Discover trusted listings, protected checkout, and a cleaner way to buy and sell every day.
footer.tagline: Built for faster browsing, safer checkouts, and confident local selling.

home.title: Buy and sell with confidence on FlupFlap
home.subtitle: Discover trusted sellers, cultural products, everyday deals, and secure checkout in one modern marketplace.
home.heroExperienceTitle: Cleaner browsing. Stronger trust. Better mobile shopping.

discovery.title: Trusted discovery
discovery.description: Spot culture-driven categories, featured products, and standout sellers faster.

shopping.title: Organized shopping
shopping.description: Use search and filters without losing a polished, modern marketplace layout.

checkout.title: Confident checkout
checkout.description: Secure payments and buyer protection keep each purchase feeling professional.

home.searchSectionSubtitle: Use search and filters to explore trusted sellers, culture-first categories, and everyday deals without losing your place.
home.cultureSectionSubtitle: Explore unique products from Caribbean, African, Asian, and local sellers.

asian.description: Discover Asian fashion, beauty, snacks, home decor, electronics, and cultural products.

african.description: Explore African fashion, fabrics, beauty, jewelry, art, food, and cultural items.

caribbean.description: Shop Haitian, Jamaican, Dominican, Trinidadian, Caribbean fashion, food, beauty, and cultural products.

home.featuredProductsSubtitle: Browse standout products, everyday deals, and recent listings with the same search and filter tools buyers already use.
home.whyShopSubtitle: Designed to feel more organized, professional, and mobile-friendly from discovery to delivery.
home.sellingCtaTitle: Open your storefront in a marketplace built for trust and discovery.
home.sellingCtaSubtitle: Reach buyers looking for cultural products, everyday essentials, and secure checkout in one modern marketplace.

discovery.title: Browse faster
discovery.description: Responsive product comparisons help buyers scan more listings without the clutter.

trust.title: Trust the seller
trust.description: Verified seller signals and protected checkout keep the marketplace professional.

fulfillment.title: Flexible fulfillment
fulfillment.description: Support both shipped orders and convenient local pickup from one storefront.

home.trustSubtitle: The homepage now puts trust, speed, and conversion-focused browsing first on every screen.
home.featuredSubtitle: A responsive product grid with filters, cleaner spacing, and faster product comparison across devices.
home.featuredRegionalSubtitle: Discover Asian sellers and products with direct category shortcuts and deeper regional browsing.

verifiedSellers.title: Verified sellers
verifiedSellers.description: Shop storefronts with clear trust signals and seller verification built in.

securePayments.title: Secure payments
securePayments.description: Protected checkout keeps orders simple, secure, and easy to complete.

shippingSupport.title: Shipping support
shippingSupport.description: Track shipped orders confidently with marketplace support from checkout onward.

buyerProtection.title: Buyer protection
buyerProtection.description: Browse with confidence thanks to clearer policies and stronger marketplace trust.

home.noProducts: No products found. Try adjusting your filters.

login.title: Sign in
login.addPhoneIntro: Seller accounts require a phone number for two-step sign-in. Please add your phone number to continue. A verification code will be sent to it.
login.phoneHint: Country code recommended (e.g. +1 for US/Canada, +44 for UK). 10-digit US numbers without a country code are also accepted.
login.otpIntro: We sent a 6-digit verification code to {phone}. Enter it below to complete sign-in.
login.resendCodeWait: Please wait {seconds}s before requesting another code.
login.tooManyRequests: Too many verification attempts. Please wait a few minutes before requesting another code.
login.invalidCode: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
login.missingLoginInfo: Login information not found. Please try again.

signup.title: Create account
signup.phoneHelp: Used for two-factor authentication when you sign in. Standard messaging rates may apply.
signup.sellerSignInRequired: Your account was created, but seller sign-in requires phone verification. Please sign in to continue.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have been moved.
